subcodes.first_line: Verily, the difficulty lies herein: whenever a hapless soul errs, it is those who are sincere, obedient, and virtuous who bear the burden [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ولکن مشکلات اینجاست که هر بدبختی خطاای کند این صادقان که اطاعت و صداقت و خیر
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @obedience to and respect for government authority
